description: A city-owned smart streetlight is malfunctioning, but the issue is with the power supply, not the light itself. The operator must report this to the electric utility.

nodes.task_description: Receive an alert for a streetlight that is repeatedly turning on and off.
Run a diagnostic on the light, which shows the bulb and controller are healthy, but input voltage is unstable.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly diagnoses the issue as a power supply problem.

nodes.task_description: Create a trouble ticket and send it to the electric utility company, as the fault lies in their infrastructure.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully reports the issue to the external utility.
